scripts.mobile:sync: CAPACITOR_BUILD=1 VITE_API_URL=https://mygymcode.com npm run build && npm run mobile:config && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:sync:android: CAPACITOR_BUILD=1 CAPACITOR_USE_BUNDLED=1 VITE_API_URL=https://mygymcode.com npm run build && CAPACITOR_USE_BUNDLED=1 npm run mobile:config && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:bundle:android: npm run mobile:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease && cd .. && cp android/app/build/outputs/bundle/release/app-release.aab ../releases/GymCode-release.aab && cp android/app/build/outputs/mapping/release/mapping.txt ../releases/GymCode-release-mapping.txt && echo 'AAB: releases/GymCode-release.aab' && echo 'Mapping: releases/GymCode-release-mapping.txt'
scripts.mobile:sync:ios: CAPACITOR_BUILD=1 CAPACITOR_USE_BUNDLED=1 VITE_API_URL=https://mygymcode.com npm run build && CAPACITOR_USE_BUNDLED=1 npm run mobile:config && npx cap sync ios
scripts.mobile:open:ios: npm run mobile:config && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:open:android: npm run mobile:config && npx cap open android
